arts.ttl: 'We want to be first' - Arteta wants more after win over Ipswich
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta praises his side for where they are in the Premier League given injuries and red cards throughout the season, but says they are "not where we want" to be.

arts.ttl: McKenna proud of Ipswich 'resilience' despite defeat
arts.sum: Ipswich manager Kieran McKenna praises his side's "resilience" in their 1-0 Premier League defeat to Arsenal at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans now have 2012 Champions League hero to thank for Cole Palmer signing after latest report
arts.sum: Another reason for Chelsea fans to love him!

arts.ttl: What Chelsea's former head of youth recruitment said about Omari Hutchinson as £20m Ipswich man now prepares to face the Blues
arts.sum: He was delighted with his arrival.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News: Mourinho plots January raid with Blues star among top targets
arts.sum: Chief among those is Spurs superstar and captain Heung-min Son as well as Roma's Nicola Zalewski . Heung-min Son is, of course, a true hero at Spurs with 169 goals and 90 assists in 429 appearances for the North London club.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans will be hoping for better result vs Ipswich than their last Premier League clash 22 years ago, Zola and Lampard couldn’t score
arts.sum: They can't have a repeat of that result.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Ipswich - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicting Chelsea's starting lineup for their final Premier League outing of 2024 against Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Kieran McKenna sets Ipswich players clear challenge for Chelsea amid 'competitive' message
arts.sum: The Tractor Boys could become only the fifth side to fail to win any of their first 10 Premier League home games in a season if they are unable to claim all three points at Portman Road on Monday. “They’ve got an extra day to prepare and I’m sure they’ll be frustrated with the result against Fulham so I’m sure they’re going to be really hungry to get three points on Monday night, but we’ve got to make sure that we match that and make it as competitive as we can.

arts.ttl: The three strikers Chelsea must now target after ridiculous Alexander Isak price tag emerges - opinion
arts.sum: The Blues are never going to pay that.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca makes Liam Delap feelings crystal clear amid Chelsea transfer talk
arts.sum: “In England they have many like him and they have many good players, good strikers and he’s working hard off the ball, on the ball, he understands the game and can score goals. Enzo Maresca has tipped Liam Delap to break into the England squad ahead of Chelsea's Premier League clash against Ipswich Town on Monday.
